raw_consumer_statement:
BetweeXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  there were XXXX high-value unauthorized XXXX charges XXXX my Barclays credit card XXXX {$1300.00}. I did not authorize any of these transactions. I reported the fraud immediately and was told I would receive a new card and that a temporary credit would be issued in about XXXX business days. 

However, I am filing this complaint because I believe Barclays failed in their fraud monitoring and consumer protection. These XXXX charges were nearly identical in amount, occurred within a short time frame, and significantly deviated from my normal spending pattern. Despite this, Barclays did not block the card, did not notify me, and did not detect the activity as suspicious. 

I asked why these were allowed to go through, and they provided no clear answer only that an investigation was opened. I want to know why such obvious fraudulent activity wasn't flagged, and I am requesting the CFPB to review Barclays fraud monitoring practices and ensure consumers are protected better in the future.
